critical_pir06_alert.status: ESCALATED WATCH — NO formal PN Supreme Council (Majlis Tertinggi) removal notice for Bersatu has been issued; HOWEVER the trajectory has visibly shifted from 'PN-removes-Bersatu' to 'Bersatu-exits-PN', with Bersatu president Muhyiddin now publicly hinting at departure.
critical_pir06_alert.negative_confirmation: Targeted Google News query 'PN Majlis Tertinggi Bersatu pecat' returned 0 items. Automated CRITICAL-pattern regex (formal PN-MT removal-notice phrasing) matched 0 titles across all collected articles this cycle. Kiandee's statement remains a CALL on the MT to act, not a notice FROM the MT.

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: Goodbye PN?: Muhyiddin raps Samsuri over BN talks, Bersatu to move on
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.key_quote: After months of escalating tensions with ally PAS, Bersatu president Muhyiddin Yassin today hinted at the party's possible exit from Perikatan Nasional. In a statement wishing PN 'all the best', Muhyiddin hit out at coalition chairperson Ahmad Samsuri Mokhtar for unilaterally deciding to enter an electoral pact with BN and sidelining Bersatu from seat negotiations.
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: PIR-06 monitor target Muhyiddin has moved from denial/defence to publicly hinting at exit and wishing PN 'all the best'. This is the Bersatu-leadership (not a suspended VP) signaling departure — a qualitative escalation. Direction of motion is now two-sided: PN-MT-may-remove-Bersatu (Kiandee) AND Bersatu-may-exit-PN (Muhyiddin).

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: Bersatu the only 'true opposition' left following cooperation between BN and PN, says Muhyiddin
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: Muhyiddin reframes Bersatu as sole true opposition post BN-PN pact — consistent with exit positioning.

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: Bersatu to form new coalition coming after Negri polls, says Muhyiddin / Bersatu to form new bloc after Negri polls
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: Muhyiddin signals Bersatu will form a NEW coalition/bloc AFTER the Negri Sembilan polls — concrete post-exit plan, pre-nomination-day statement.

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: Negri polls: Bersatu's use of own logo shows it wants to part ways with PN, says Annuar Musa
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: Bersatu sec-gen Annuar Musa publicly states Bersatu wants to part ways with PN (Bersatu contesting under own flag/logo).

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: SNAPSHOT | Johor regent: Excos must be dedicated in their work; Bersatu exit from PN imminent?
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: Mainstream outlet now framing exit as 'imminent?' — narrative has entered imminent-departure framing.

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: PN rift widens as PAS sends clearest signal yet of sidelining Bersatu
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: PAS now openly sidelining Bersatu — the PAS side of the PN-Bersatu fracture.

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: Bersatu tidak lagi mahu bersama PN - Ronald
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.key_quote: Majlis Tertinggi Perikatan Nasional mempunyai asas yang kukuh untuk mengeluarkan Bersatu daripada gabungan Parti Perikatan Nasional. — Datuk Seri Dr. Ronald Kiandee (Bekas Naib Presiden Bersatu / suspended VP, MP Beluran)
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: Malay-language confirmation of the PIR-06 precursor signal first captured at 153251. Kiandee explicitly uses 'mengeluarkan Bersatu' (remove Bersatu) + 'asas kukuh' + 'Majlis Tertinggi'. Still a CALL on PN-MT, not an MT-issued notice.

critical_pir06_alert.trajectory_assessment: CRITICAL threshold (formal PN-MT removal notice) NOT crossed. But the situation has materially escalated: the principal (Bersatu president Muhyiddin) is now publicly hinting at exit and signaling a new post-election bloc, and a mainstream outlet is framing exit as 'imminent'. The most likely near-term outcome is Bersatu voluntarily realigning/exiting AFTER the Aug 1 poll rather than a formal PN-MT expulsion beforehand — but a reactive PN-MT removal notice remains possible if Bersatu candidates actively damage PN partners in the 8 Tier-4 seats.
critical_pir06_alert.tier4_candidate_withdrawal_trigger: NO Bersatu candidate withdrawals detected in the 8 Tier-4 seats this cycle. (Prior cycle's Bujang withdrawal was an independent, paperwork-related — not a PIR-06 trigger.)

tier4_seats_bersatu_vs_pn_component.match_to_pir06_list: EXACT — all 8 seats (N.04, N.05, N.13, N.14, N.23, N.25, N.31, N.34) confirmed

new_this_cycle.headline: MCA Youth sec-gen told to 'stay out of N Sembilan polls' over PN ally disagreement
new_this_cycle.key_quote: MCA has allegedly instructed its youth wing secretary-general Saw Yee Fung to skip its campaign for the Negeri Sembilan state election, after she openly criticised BN's decision to cooperate with Perikatan Nasional. ... screenshot of a WhatsApp message from MCA secretary-general Chong Sin Woon that says 'you don't have to come' for the state polls.
new_this_cycle.pir_significance: NEW PIR-09 angle: internal BN-component (MCA) disciplinary silencing of a dissenting Youth leader over the BN-PN pact. Party-discipline/credibility dynamic — not a candidate expulsion, but a candidate-campaign exclusion. Adds to the 'PN-component disciplinary actions' pattern (cf. prior cycle's Gerakan pecat of Tang Jay Son).

new_this_cycle.headline: From PN camp, Albert calls Harapan supporters 'barking dogs'

delta_vs_prior_cycle_153251.wall_clock_window_note: This cycle ran in the late-night MYT window (~01:08 MYT 19 Jul); Malaysian news output is thin at this hour. Most 'new' items are nomination-day (18 Jul MYT daytime) articles that the 153251 cycle did not capture due to source-access gaps (malaysiakini paywalled, thestar 0 priority, nst not yet JS-blocked-or-not-captured). Value this cycle = source-gap fill + escalation-narrative corroboration, NOT real-time new event detection.
